# Nelder City

First mentioned: **3304-01-26**  
Last mentioned: **3304-02-02**  
Total mentions: **4**

## Related

- [[Angeli Imperial Enterprises]] (4 co-mentions)
- [[Wangal]] (4 co-mentions)

## Biography

Nelder City orbits in the Wangal system, a location that in early 3304 found itself at the centre of an unexpectedly cheerful initiative. Angeli Imperial Enterprises chose the station as the delivery point for construction materials needed to build DaMorg's Bar and BBQ, an orbital family restaurant intended to showcase Wangal's culinary offerings to passing spacers.

The company paid well above market rates for outfitting materials, drawing independent traders to Nelder City in large numbers. A spokesperson quoted an ancient proverb to explain the venture: "When there is plenty of wine, sorrow and worry take wing." The project offered a rare moment of levity amid the galactic tensions of the period, proving that even in an era of Thargoid conflict and superpower rivalry, there was still demand for good food and convivial atmosphere.
